name: Merino Wool Sweater
description: Crafted from the finest Merino wool, this classic sweater offers exceptional softness and warmth. A wardrobe essential that pairs effortlessly with both casual and formal attire.

name: Moleskin Field Jacket
description: A rugged yet refined field jacket in heavyweight moleskin cotton. Features multiple utility pockets, a corduroy collar, and a classic fit that improves with age.

name: Corduroy Trousers
description: Wide-wale corduroy trousers cut in a relaxed straight fit. The rich texture and saturated colour make these a standout piece for the season.

name: Tattersall Check Shirt
description: The quintessential tattersall shirt, woven in a soft brushed cotton. The classic check pattern makes this a heritage staple that works as well in the country as in the city.

name: Leather Derby Shoes
description: Hand-stitched Derby shoes in full-grain leather. The Goodyear-welted sole ensures longevity and allows for resoling, making these an investment for decades of wear.

name: Cashmere Roll-Neck
description: Luxuriously soft two-ply cashmere roll-neck. The generous ribbing and relaxed fit make this the ultimate cold-weather essential for those who refuse to compromise on quality.

name: Waxed Cotton Vest
description: A re-waxed cotton shooting vest with quilted lining panels. The classic design features multiple game pockets and a cartridge belt loop — heritage workwear at its finest.

name: Wool Flat Cap
description: A traditional flat cap woven in a classic British herringbone tweed. Fully lined in satin for comfort, this cap is the perfect finishing touch for any country or city ensemble.
